title: n8n REST URLs returning 404 status code
symptom: When accessing any URL with '/rest', the server responds with a 404 Not Found error. The frontend loads correctly, but API endpoints are unreachable.
applies_when: Using nginx as a reverse proxy
not_this_if: n8n is accessed directly without a proxy
The error occurs on non-REST endpoints
root_cause: The configuration for n8n in Docker is incorrect, specifically the N8N_PROTOCOL is set to https while it should be http. Additionally, setting the N8N_PATH can interfere with routing if not needed.
fix_steps: Change the N8N_PROTOCOL environment variable from 'https' to 'http' in the docker-compose file.
Remove the N8N_PATH variable from the docker-compose file if it is not necessary.
Restart the n8n Docker container to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Update the N8N_PROTOCOL to 'http' and remove the N8N_PATH variable, then restart the container.
